title: Vejalpur Heat Wave
lead: Vejalpur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.06. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, causing concern for residents and infrastructure.
body:
The current heat wave in Vejalpur has a score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The CDD of 13.2 GG and low humidity of 47% are exacerbating the situation. 
 The wind speed of 10.1 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Vejalpur.
